Body.Content:
Call Waiting Beep is a feature designed to provide a subtle notification tone when a user is already on a call and a second call comes in. This gentle alert ensures the user is aware of the incoming call without being overly disruptive.

GA date: June CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Call Waiting Beep Enabled on Desktop
